metadata.title: deKorvai | Unified Data Quality, ETL & Scrambling Platform
metadata.description: One platform for data quality profiling, ETL transformation, and data scrambling. Simplify SAP S/4HANA migrations with AI-powered data intelligence.

etlPipeline.title: ETL Pipeline
etlPipeline.desc: Extract, transform & load with smart rules

agenticAi.title: Agentic AI
agenticAi.desc: Built-in AI that auto-detects & resolves issues

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: SAP, Oracle, SQL Server & flat files

dataStaging.title: Data Staging
dataStaging.desc: In-built staging with validation before load

hero.subheadline: deKorvai unifies data quality profiling, ETL transformation, and data scrambling into a single AI-powered platform. Simplify your SAP S/4HANA migrations and eliminate tool sprawl.

problemSolution.subtitle: Organizations struggle with fragmented tools, manual processes, and poor data quality during greenfield and bluefield implementations.

problems.p1: Multiple disconnected tools for profiling, ETL, and scrambling
problems.p2: Manual Excel-based profiling that misses critical data issues
problems.p3: Months of delays during data migration due to poor quality
problems.p4: Unable to use production data in test environments without scrambling
problems.p5: Data errors discovered only during migration go-live, causing failures

solutions.s4: Compliant data scrambling for test environments
solutions.s5: Detect and resolve data issues before they cause failures

features.subtitle: Replace your fragmented toolchain with a single, intelligent platform that handles data quality, ETL, and scrambling.

dataQualityProfiling.title: Data Quality Profiling
dataQualityProfiling.description: Out-of-the-box profiling with customizable rules for completeness, accuracy, and consistency. Detect anomalies and drift automatically.

etlPipeline.title: ETL Pipeline Engine
etlPipeline.description: Full and incremental extraction with smart rules. Ready-to-use and DIY transformation functions with optimized loading.

dataScrambling.title: Data Scrambling
dataScrambling.description: Scramble production data for non-production environments. GDPR, HIPAA, and SOX compliant with field-level control.

agenticAi.title: Agentic AI
agenticAi.description: Built-in AI agents that auto-detect data issues, suggest transformations, and make smart decisions throughout the pipeline.

realTimeMonitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
realTimeMonitoring.description: Continuous monitoring scorecards and execution tracking across every stage of your data pipeline.

complianceAudit.title: Compliance & Audit
complianceAudit.description: 100% audit readiness with complete change logs, audit trails, and compliance enforcement built into every operation.

howItWorks.subtitle: What used to take 4 different tools and months of manual effort now happens in a single, streamlined workflow.

s1.title: Connect & Extract
s1.description: Connect to your SAP ECC, Oracle, SQL Server, or any relational database. Define extraction rules with conditions, filters, and incremental options. deKorvai handles full and delta loads automatically.

s2.title: Profile & Validate
s2.description: Automatically profile your data for completeness, accuracy, and consistency. Detect duplicates, missing mandatory fields, and anomalies before they cause migration failures.

s3.title: Transform & Scramble
s3.description: Apply transformation mappings for company codes, org structures, and accounts. Scramble sensitive data for test environments while maintaining referential integrity.

s4.title: Validate & Load
s4.description: Validate transformed data against target system rules before loading. Stage, review, and load with confidence — with complete audit trails for every record.

whyDqView.subtitle: deKorvai is purpose-built for enterprise transformation programs where data migration is the most critical and complex workstream.

r1.title: One Platform, Not Five
r1.description: Replace separate tools for extraction, profiling, transformation, scrambling, and loading with a single unified platform that handles every stage of the data pipeline.

r2.title: Agentic AI Built-In
r2.description: AI agents auto-detect data issues, suggest transformation rules, and make smart decisions — reducing manual effort and accelerating your program delivery.

r3.title: Scrambling Without Compromise
r3.description: Run SIT/UAT with real production-like data. Field-level scrambling with predefined profiles ensures GDPR, HIPAA, and SOX compliance while keeping data realistic.

r4.title: Profiling That Prevents Failures
r4.description: Catch duplicates, missing mandatory fields, and data anomalies before migration — not during go-live. Customizable profiling rules replace manual Excel checks.

r5.title: Faster Time-to-Value
r5.description: Reduce migration lead time at every stage and mock cycle. Teams using deKorvai consistently meet aggressive timelines that seemed impossible with manual approaches.

r6.title: Flexible Transformation Engine
r6.description: Ready-to-use and DIY transformation functions with smart field mapping. Map source company codes, org structures, and recon accounts to target with ease.

whyDqView.programsSubtitle: From greenfield implementations to regional roll-outs, deKorvai supports every type of SAP transformation program.

p1.title: S/4HANA Greenfield
p1.description: Full data migration from SAP ECC to S/4HANA with automated Business Partner conversion, BP role extension, and vendor/customer linking.

p2.title: S/4HANA Bluefield
p2.description: Selective data transition with complex filtering, deduplication, and field-level transformation for master and transactional data.

p3.title: S/4HANA GROW
p3.description: Rapid data loading from legacy applications to GROW environments, meeting aggressive timelines for cloud-first implementations.

p4.title: S/4HANA Roll-Outs
p4.description: Regional roll-out programs with master and transaction data migration, profiling, and quality checks across multiple entities.

p5.title: System Consolidation
p5.description: Merge data from multiple SAP and non-SAP systems into a single target with automated deduplication and conflict resolution.

p6.title: Test Data Management
p6.description: Scramble SAP and non-SAP production data for test environments, enabling realistic testing without compliance risk.

useCases.subtitle: From SAP S/4HANA migrations to continuous data governance — deKorvai handles the most complex enterprise data scenarios.

c1.title: SAP S/4HANA Greenfield Migration
c1.description: Migrate Vendor and Customer masters from SAP ECC to S/4HANA Business Partner with automated extraction rules, transformation mappings, and quality validation.

c2.title: Bluefield / Selective Data Transition
c2.description: Selectively migrate master and transactional data with complex filtering, deduplication, and field-level transformation — all in one platform.

c3.title: Test Data Management
c3.description: Scramble production data for SIT/UAT environments, enabling teams to test with realistic data while maintaining GDPR and HIPAA compliance.

c4.title: Continuous Data Quality Governance
c4.description: Monitor data quality across your enterprise with real-time scorecards, anomaly detection, and automated profiling that catches issues before they escalate.

useCaseShowcase.subtitle: See how deKorvai orchestrates the full Business Partner migration from SAP ECC to S/4HANA — the most complex workstream in any transformation program.
useCaseShowcase.scenarioTitle: Vendor to Business Partner Migration — SAP ECC to S/4HANA
useCaseShowcase.scenarioDescription: 50,000+ vendor records across multiple company codes and purchasing organizations, migrated with automated extraction rules, profiling, transformation, and loading into DMC staging tables.

extract.title: Extract
extract.description: Rule-based extraction of vendor address, tax, bank, company code, and purchasing org data. Auto-exclude blocked or flagged vendors.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Validate company codes, detect duplicates, and check mandatory fields. Invalid records routed to owners automatically.

transform.title: Transform
transform.description: Map source company codes, purchasing orgs, and recon accounts to target. Extend BP roles and link vendor numbers.

validate.title: Validate
validate.description: Pre-load validation against S/4HANA rules. Only clean, profiled data proceeds to DMC staging tables.

load.title: Load
load.description: Direct load into DMC staging tables with simulation runs. 95%+ first-pass rate in DMC migration.

useCaseShowcase.ctaText: Read the full technical walkthrough of this BP migration scenario.

comparison.subtitle: The only platform that unifies data quality, ETL, and scrambling — replacing multiple point solutions.

q1.quote: We used deKorvai in the S/4HANA Roll-out program for US to migrate the master and transaction data along with profiling which helped to reduce significant amount of effort in data migration.

q2.quote: We used deKorvai in the S/4HANA Grow program to load the data from legacy applications to the GROW applications which helped to not exceed the 3 months target that we had in hand while starting the program.

q3.quote: Coromandel International uses deKorvai for scrambling their SAP and non-SAP applications, ensuring compliant test environments across their entire enterprise landscape.

q4.quote: The world's #2 brewer uses deKorvai for scrambling their non-SAP applications, enabling teams to work with production-like data while maintaining full regulatory compliance.

insights.subtitle: Insights from the Business Core Solutions team on data quality, SAP transformation, and the future of enterprise AI.

cta.subtitle: Book a personalized demo and see how deKorvai can simplify your next data migration, improve data quality, and accelerate your transformation program.

globalPresence.subtitle: With offices spanning Europe, the Americas, Asia, and Australia, we deliver follow-the-sun support for enterprise transformation programs.
